task_completion.description: Disable the automatic marking of messages as read
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird's General Settings (under 'Reading & Display'), the checkbox for 'Automatically mark messages as read' should be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Set messages to open in a new window instead of a tab
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird's General Settings (under 'Reading & Display'), the radio button for 'Open messages in: A new message window' must be selected.

task_completion.description: Enable the option to close the message window upon moving or deleting a message
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird's General Settings (under 'Reading & Display'), the checkbox for 'Close message window/tab on move or delete' must be checked.

task_completion.description: Disable visual alerts for incoming mail
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird's General Settings (under 'Incoming Mails'), the checkbox for 'Show an alert' must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Disable sound notifications for incoming mail
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird's General Settings (under 'Incoming Mails'), the checkbox for 'Play a sound' must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Configure the Local Folders account to empty the trash on exit
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird's Account Settings, under the 'Local Folders' section, the checkbox for 'Empty Trash on Exit' must be checked.

task_completion.description: Ensure all settings and account tabs are closed
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots, the Thunderbird tab bar should only show the main mail tab (e.g., Inbox). There should be no 'Settings' or 'Account Settings' tabs open.

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird GUI to change settings rather than modifying prefs.js via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the Thunderbird Settings and Account Settings graphical interfaces, not using a terminal emulator to edit configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Thunderbird application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird application window should be visible with its standard layout, menus, and icons, rather than a web browser search or a text document containing the settings.

integrity.description: The agent manually clicked through the UI to configure the workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show step-by-step navigation (e.g., opening the hamburger menu, clicking Settings, scrolling to sections) rather than settings magically changing without UI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: To verify correctness, look for the following UI states in Thunderbird: 1) 'Automatically mark messages as read' is unchecked. 2) 'Open messages in' is set to 'A new message window'. 3) 'Close message window/tab on move or delete' is checked. 4) 'Show an alert' for new mail is unchecked. 5) 'Play a sound' for new mail is unchecked. 6) In Account Settings > Local Folders, 'Empty Trash on Exit' is checked. Finally, all Settings and Account Settings tabs must be closed in the final state to flush preferences to disk.
